sqlCommand.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Co,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,GLDesc,CC,BusCat,Flex5,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Pcdesc,Division,Ccdesc,Crcy,Region,Location,Ledger,Flex9,Fsitem,Zone) (Select '[batchID]',Vend,Co,Name,Name2,Street,City,PostalCode,Region,Country,Phone,Phone2,Fax,Email,SearchTerm,CreatedOn,CreatedBy,ConfirmStatus,ConfirmDate,Grp,Clsd,VAT,Tax_Jur,TaxID from Vendors x inner join Misc_Tables m on Table_ID = 'CoSelect' and substring(m.Descr,1,4) = '[CoSelect]' inner join ElimSelect e on ElimID = 'Co:' + m.ID where (e.Oper = 'EQ' and x.Co = e.FromVal) or (e.Oper = 'BT' and x.Co >= e.FromVal and x.Co <= e.ThruVal))
